```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""운영 서버(Cloudflare tunnel) 대상 채용공고 분석 E2E 테스트.
URL / TEXT / IMAGE 3종 소스로 업로드 → 분석 결과 요약 출력.
"""
import base64
import io
import json
import sys

import httpx

BASE = "https://suite-pic-heaven-sacrifice.trycloudflare.com"
EMAIL = "smoke-jobtest@test.com"
PASSWORD = "password123"

SARAMIN_URL = "https://www.saramin.co.kr/zf_user/jobs/relay/view?rec_idx=52006901"

TEXT_POSTING = """
[네오테크솔루션] 백엔드 개발자 (경력 3년 이상) 채용

담당업무
- Spring Boot 기반 커머스 플랫폼 API 설계 및 개발
- MSA 환경에서 주문/결제 도메인 서비스 운영
- 대용량 트래픽 처리를 위한 성능 최적화 및 캐싱 전략 수립
- RDB(PostgreSQL) 스키마 설계 및 쿼리 튜닝

지원 자격
- Java / Kotlin 및 Spring Framework 3년 이상 실무 경험
- JPA 등 ORM 사용 경험
- RESTful API 설계 경험
- 4년제 대학 졸업 이상

우대사항
- Kafka, Redis 등 미들웨어 운영 경험
- AWS 기반 인프라 운영 경험 (EKS, RDS)
- 대규모 커머스/핀테크 도메인 경험
- 오픈소스 기여 경험

근무조건
- 근무형태: 정규직 (수습 3개월)
- 근무지: 서울 강남구 테헤란로
- 급여: 회사 내규에 따름 (협의 가능)

기업문화
- 자율 출퇴근제, 원격근무 주 2회
- 최신 장비 지원, 도서/교육비 무제한
""".strip()


def make_posting_png() -> bytes:
    """한글 채용공고 PNG 생성 (Vision/OCR 경로 테스트용)."""
    from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont

    lines = [
        "[클라우드웨이브] DevOps 엔지니어 채용 (경력직)",
        "",
        "담당업무",
        "- Kubernetes 클러스터 구축 및 운영 (EKS)",
        "- CI/CD 파이프라인 설계 (GitHub Actions, ArgoCD)",
        "- 모니터링/알림 체계 구축 (Prometheus, Grafana)",
        "- IaC 기반 인프라 관리 (Terraform)",
        "",
        "지원 자격",
        "- Docker/Kubernetes 실무 경험 2년 이상",
        "- Linux 서버 운영 경험",
        "- Python 또는 Shell 스크립트 작성 능력",
        "",
        "우대사항",
        "- AWS 자격증 보유 (SAA 이상)",
        "- 서비스 메시 (Istio) 운영 경험",
        "- 보안 규정 준수(ISMS) 대응 경험",
        "",
        "근무형태: 정규직 / 근무지: 판교",
    ]
    font = ImageFont.truetype(r"C:\Windows\Fonts\malgun.ttf", 28)
    img = Image.new("RGB", (900, 60 + len(lines) * 44), "white")
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    y = 30
    for line in lines:
        draw.text((40, y), line, fill="black", font=font)
        y += 44
    buf = io.BytesIO()
    img.save(buf, format="PNG")
    return buf.getvalue()


def summarize(label: str, analysis: dict):
    print(f"\n===== {label} =====")
    if not analysis:
        print("  (no analysis)")
        return
    for key in ("position", "company_name", "extraction_method", "model"):
        if key in analysis:
            print(f"  {key}: {analysis.get(key)}")
    for key in ("required_skills", "preferred_skills", "job_responsibilities", "tech_keywords"):
        val = analysis.get(key)
        if isinstance(val, list):
            print(f"  {key} ({len(val)}): {val[:4]}")


def main():
    client = httpx.Client(base_url=BASE, timeout=240.0)

    # --- auth ---
    r = client.post("/api/v1/auth/signup", json={"email": EMAIL, "password": PASSWORD, "name": "공고테스트"})
    print("signup:", r.status_code)
    r = client.post("/api/v1/auth/login", json={"email": EMAIL, "password": PASSWORD})
    r.raise_for_status()
    token = r.json()["data"]["accessToken"]
    client.headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"
    print("login: OK")

    results = {}

    # --- 1) URL ---
    try:
        r = client.post("/api/v1/job-postings/upload", json={
            "sourceType": "URL", "sourceUrl": SARAMIN_URL, "title": "E2E URL 테스트(사람인)",
        })
        print("\n[URL] upload:", r.status_code)
        body = r.json()
        pid = body["data"]["id"]
        a = client.get(f"/api/v1/job-postings/{pid}/analysis").json()["data"]
        results["URL(사람인)"] = a
    except Exception as e:
        print("[URL] FAILED:", repr(e)[:300])

    # --- 2) TEXT ---
    try:
        r = client.post("/api/v1/job-postings/upload", json={
            "sourceType": "TEXT", "content": TEXT_POSTING, "title": "E2E TEXT 테스트(네오테크)",
        })
        print("\n[TEXT] upload:", r.status_code)
        pid = r.json()["data"]["id"]
        a = client.get(f"/api/v1/job-postings/{pid}/analysis").json()["data"]
        results["TEXT(복사 공고)"] = a
    except Exception as e:
        print("[TEXT] FAILED:", repr(e)[:300])

    # --- 3) IMAGE (PNG) ---
    try:
        png = make_posting_png()
        print("\n[IMAGE] png bytes:", len(png))
        r = client.post(
            "/api/v1/job-postings/upload/file",
            files={"file": ("posting.png", png, "image/png")},
            data={"title": "E2E IMAGE 테스트(클라우드웨이브)"},
        )
        print("[IMAGE] upload:", r.status_code)
        pid = r.json()["data"]["id"]
        a = client.get(f"/api/v1/job-postings/{pid}/analysis").json()["data"]
        results["IMAGE(PNG 공고)"] = a
    except Exception as e:
        print("[IMAGE] FAILED:", repr(e)[:300])

    for label, a in results.items():
        summarize(label, a)

    # 전체 JSON은 파일로 저장 (검토용)
    with open(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "job_e2e_results.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

```

운영 서버(터널 URL)에 테스트 계정(`smoke-jobtest@test.com`)을 만들어 3가지 소스 타입 모두 실제 LLM 호출까지 완료했습니다. **전부 성공(200)이고, 셋 다 `gemini-2.5-flash`로 분석됐습니다.**

## 테스트 결과

| # | 소스 | 추출 경로 | 결과 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **URL** — [사람인 백엔드 공고](https://www.saramin.co.kr/zf_user/jobs/relay/view?rec_idx=52006901) | `url+llm` | ⚠️ 부분 성공 — 회사명(`HR컨설팅(주)`)·직무(`백엔드 개발자`)는 정확히 추출했으나 스킬/자격 리스트는 전부 빈 배열 |
| 2 | **TEXT** — 복사한 공고 텍스트(가상 "네오테크솔루션") | `text+llm` | ✅ 완벽 — 필수 3·우대 4·자격 2·담당업무 4·기술키워드 7, 기업문화까지 원문과 정확히 일치 |
| 3 | **IMAGE** — PIL로 생성한 한글 공고 PNG("클라우드웨이브" DevOps) | `vision` | ✅ 완벽 — 필수 3·우대 3·담당업무 4·기술키워드 15, 이미지 속 텍스트를 전부 정확히 읽음. OCR 폴백 없이 Vision 1회로 종료 |

## 주목할 점

**긍정적**: URL 케이스에서 사람인이 봇 차단으로 본문 대신 제목 정도만 내려줬는데(raw_content 1,871자가 대부분 네비게이션), LLM이 지어내지 않고 `jobDescription`에 *"제공된 채용공고 본문이 없어 상세 내용을 추출할 수 없습니다"*라고 명시하고 리스트를 비웠습니다. "근거 없으면 생성하지 않는다"는 핵심 원칙이 실전에서 작동하는 것을 확인했습니다.

**개선 여지**: 사람인/잡코리아는 서버 사이드 `httpx` 요청을 차단하거나 JS 렌더링이 필요해서 URL 경로의 실효성이 낮습니다. `_fetch_url`의 User-Agent가 `ResumePilot/1.0`인데 일반 브라우저 UA로 바꾸면 통과율이 다소 오를 수 있고, 근본적으로는 "URL 분석이 빈약하면 TEXT 복사 업로드를 안내"하는 UX가 현실적입니다.

**참고**: 어제 논의했던 vision/OCR 분기 이슈와 관련해, 오늘 IMAGE 테스트는 제가 만든 선명한 PNG라 Vision이 품질 기준을 한 번에 통과해 `vision`으로 끝났습니다(OCR 미개입). 노이즈 많은 실제 포스터 이미지에서는 여전히 `ocr+llm` 덮어쓰기 이슈가 살아있습니다.

주의: 방금 확인한 서버는 **LangChain 전환 전 코드**로 돌고 있습니다(로컬 변경분 미배포·미커밋). 로컬 변경분을 커밋·푸시하면 CI가 배포하니, 원하시면 진행하겠습니다. 테스트로 생성된 공고 3건은 그대로 뒀는데 삭제를 원하시면 지우겠습니다.

두 이슈 모두 원인과 해결 방안을 설명드립니다. (설명만이고, 승인하시면 구현하겠습니다.)

## 1. 사람인/잡코리아 URL 차단 대응

**원인**: [job_analysis_service.py:396-404](resume-ai/app/services/job_analysis_service.py#L396-L404)의 `_fetch_url`이 `User-Agent: ResumePilot/1.0`으로 요청합니다. 사람인·잡코리아는 ① 비브라우저 UA 차단, ② 데이터센터/해외 IP 차단, ③ 핵심 본문을 JS 렌더링 후 로드 — 3중 장벽이 있어서 서버 fetch로는 제목 정도만 얻습니다.

**대응 방안 3단계 (효과 순):**

| 방안 | 효과 | 비용 |
|---|---|---|
| ① UA를 브라우저형으로 변경 + `Accept-Language: ko` 헤더 | 낮음~중간 — UA 차단만 통과, JS 렌더링 공고는 여전히 빈약 | 코드 2줄, 5분 |
| ② **분석 결과 빈약 시 TEXT 업로드 안내 UX** (권장) | 높음 — 어떤 사이트든 사용자가 본문 복사로 확실히 해결 | resume-web 안내 배너 + 판정 조건 1개 |
| ③ Playwright 등 헤드리스 브라우저로 서버 렌더링 fetch | 확실하지만 과함 | 컨테이너에 브라우저 추가(~500MB), 요청당 수 초, 차단 리스크 여전 |

**권장 조합 = ① + ②**: UA는 바꿔서 통과율을 조금이라도 올리고, 핵심은 ② — 분석 결과가 `required/preferred/responsibilities` 전부 비어 있으면 프론트에서 "이 사이트는 자동 수집이 제한됩니다. 공고 본문을 복사해 TEXT로 업로드해 주세요" 배너를 띄우는 것입니다. 판정 신호는 이미 백엔드에 있습니다(리스트 카운트 0). ③은 지금 규모에선 비추천입니다.

## 2. Vision/OCR 덮어쓰기 품질 이슈

**원인 요약** (어제 확인한 것): [job_analysis_service.py:148-167](resume-ai/app/services/job_analysis_service.py#L148-L167)에서 Vision 결과가 품질 기준을 통과해도, OCR 텍스트가 저품질이면(`ocr_is_low_quality` — 포스터 이미지는 거의 항상 해당) OCR+LLM을 한 번 더 돌리고, 그 결과가 "리스트만 채워져 있으면" **Vision 결과를 통째로 대체**합니다. 품질 검사가 "채워졌는지"만 보고 "정확한지"는 안 보기 때문에, 깨진 OCR 문장(`©`, `근무형태:...` 등)이 우대사항에 들어간 결과가 이기는 경우가 생깁니다.

**수정 방안 (효과 큰 순):**

1. **덮어쓰기 금지 + 병합(merge)** — 핵심 수정.
   - Vision이 `is_quality_result` 통과 → **즉시 반환은 유지하되**, OCR 경로 진입 조건에서 `ocr_is_low_quality(ocr_text)` 항목을 제거. 즉 OCR+LLM은 "Vision이 실패했거나 품질 미달일 때만" 실행.
   - Vision이 부분적으로 부실한 경우(예: `company_name == "Unknown"`, `preferred_skills` 빈 배열)는 OCR 결과로 **빈 필드만 채움** — 전체 교체가 아니라 필드 단위 보완.

2. **OCR 노이즈 필터** — OCR 경로가 실행될 때 후처리에서:
   - `근무형태`, `접수기간`, `채용절차` 등 조건 항목이 스킬 리스트에 들어오면 제거
   - `©`, 단독 특수문자, 한글 자모 깨짐(`ㅁ1/ㅁ×` 패턴), 문장 길이 5자 미만 조각 제거

3. **품질 판정 강화** — `is_quality_result`에 "리스트 개수" 외에 "항목 정합성" 추가: 리스트 항목 중 노이즈 패턴 비율이 일정 이상이면 품질 미달 처리. 이러면 깨진 OCR 결과가 애초에 채택되지 않습니다.

4. **(보너스) `ocr+llm+llm` 이중 접미사 버그** — 같은 파일의 문자열 결합 버그인데, 1번 수정하면서 같이 정리하면 됩니다. [151-167줄](resume-ai/app/services/job_analysis_service.py#L151-L167)에 `"ocr+llm" if ... else "ocr+llm"`라는 무의미한 조건식도 있어서 함께 정리 대상입니다.

**기대 효과**: 같은 이미지를 올릴 때마다 결과가 널뛰던 것(Gemini Vision 비결정성 × OCR 덮어쓰기)이, "Vision 우선 + 부족분만 보완"으로 바뀌어 일관성이 크게 올라갑니다. Vision이 완전히 실패하는 저품질 이미지에서는 지금처럼 OCR 폴백이 그대로 동작합니다.

두 작업 모두 resume-ai(+②는 resume-web 일부)만 건드리고 마이그레이션·환경변수 변경은 없습니다. 진행할까요? 진행한다면 ①+② 세트와 vision/OCR 수정 중 어느 쪽부터 할지 말씀해 주세요.

```text
100	class JobAnalysisService:

107	        mime_type: str | None = None,
108	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
109	        st = source_type.upper()
110	
111	        if st == "IMAGE" and file_base64:
112	            return await self._analyze_image(file_base64, mime_type, st)
113

115	        extraction_method = "text"
116

119	            extraction_method = "url"

122	            extraction_method = "pdf"

125	        if not text:

127

134	        source_type: str,
135	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
136	        vision_result: dict[str, Any] | None = None
137	        vision_model: str | None = None
138	
139	        if await self._can_use_llm():
140	            vision_raw, vision_model = await self._vision_extract(file_base64, mime_type)
141	            if vision_raw:
142	                vision_result = self._finalize_fields(

145	                    extraction_method="vision",

150	                    return vision_result

153	        ocr_text = self._normalize_text(ocr_text)
154

156	            should_try_text_llm = (
157	                not vision_result
158	                or not is_quality_result(vision_result)
159	                or ocr_is_low_quality(ocr_text)
160	            )
161	            if should_try_text_llm:

165	                    source_type,
166	                )
167	                if is_quality_result(llm_result):
168	                    return llm_result
169

171	            return vision_result
172

174	            rule_result = self._finalize_fields(

177	                extraction_method="ocr+rule",
178	                source_type=source_type,
179	                model=RULE_BASED_MODEL,
180	            )

182	            return rule_result
183

216	                bool(settings.openai_api_key or settings.internal_api_token),
217	            )
218	
219	        rule_result = self._finalize_fields(
220	            self._extract_from_text(text),
221	            source_text=text,
222	            extraction_method=f"{extraction_method}+rule",
223	            source_type=source_type,
224	            model=RULE_BASED_MODEL,
225	            raw_content=text[:5000],
226	        )
227	        return rule_result
```

```text
136	def build_source_blob(data: dict[str, Any], source_text: str = "") -> str:
137	    chunks = [source_text]
138	    for key in (
139	        "company_name",
140	        "position",
141	        "job_description",
142	        "org_culture",
143	        "qualifications",
144	        "required_skills",
145	        "preferred_skills",
146	        "job_responsibilities",
147	        "tech_keywords",
148	        "talent_profile",
149	        "core_competencies",
150	    ):
151	        value = data.get(key)
152	        if isinstance(value, list):
153	            chunks.extend(str(item) for item in value)
154	        elif value:
155	            chunks.append(str(value))
156	    return "\n".join(chunk for chunk in chunks if chunk)

159	def resolve_company_name(data: dict[str, Any], source_text: str = "") -> str:
160	    company = clean_company_name(str(data.get("company_name") or "").strip() or "Unknown")
161	    if company != "Unknown" and not has_ocr_garbage(company):
162	        return company
163	
164	    blob = build_source_blob(data, source_text)
165	    patterns = [
166	        r"([가-힣][가-힣A-Za-z0-9·/&\-\s]{3,40}?(?:전문\s*기업|그룹|주식회사|\(주\)|㈜|Corp\.?|Inc\.?))",
167	        r"(\[[^\]]{2,40}\])",
168	    ]
169	    for pattern in patterns:
170	        match = re.search(pattern, blob)
171	        if match:
172	            candidate = clean_company_name(match.group(1).strip())
173	            if candidate and candidate != "Unknown" and not has_ocr_garbage(candidate):
174	                return candidate
175	    return company

178	def clean_company_name(name: str) -> str:
179	    cleaned = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", name.strip())
180	    if not cleaned or cleaned == "Unknown":
181	        return cleaned or "Unknown"
182	
183	    cleaned = re.sub(r"^(?:SELF|PAGE|HOME|JOIN|CAREER)[!.\s·\-]*", "", cleaned, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
184	    cleaned = re.sub(r"^[!.\s·\-]+", "", cleaned)
185	
186	    # Preserve Korean company abbreviations such as KB금융그룹, SK하이닉스, LG전자.
187	    if re.match(r"^[A-Z]{1,5}[가-힣]", cleaned):
188	        return cleaned.strip()
189	
190	    cleaned = COMPANY_PREFIX_NOISE.sub("", cleaned)
191	    cleaned = re.sub(r"^[!.\s·\-]+", "", cleaned)
192	    korean_tail = re.search(r"([가-힣][가-힣\s·/&\-]{2,60}(?:전문\s*기업|그룹|주식회사|\(주\)|㈜)?)", cleaned)
193	    if korean_tail and cleaned != korean_tail.group(1):
194	        latin_prefix = cleaned[: korean_tail.start()].strip()
195	        if latin_prefix and re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z!.\s·\-]{2,20}", latin_prefix):
196	            cleaned = korean_tail.group(1).strip()
197	
198	    return cleaned.strip() or "Unknown"

249	def split_experience_from_skill_lines(
250	    qualifications: list[str],
251	    required_skills: list[str],
252	) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
253	    quals: list[str] = []
254	    kept_required: list[str] = []
255	    exp_years_added: set[str] = set()
256	
257	    def handle_line(item: str, default_bucket: str) -> None:
258	        match = EXPERIENCE_YEARS_EXTRACT.search(item)
259	        if match and count_tech_tokens(item) > 0:
260	            years = match.group(1)
261	            if years not in exp_years_added:
262	                quals.append(f"관련 분야 경력 {years}년 이상")
263	                exp_years_added.add(years)
264	            stripped = re.sub(r"[\s·ㆍ,/]*(?:경력\s*)?\d+\s*년\s*이상", "", item).strip()
265	            stripped = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", stripped).strip(" ,/·-")
266	            if stripped:
267	                kept_required.append(stripped)
268	        elif EXPERIENCE_YEARS_EXTRACT.search(item) and count_tech_tokens(item) == 0:
269	            quals.append(item)
270	        elif is_technical_requirement(item):
271	            kept_required.append(item)
272	        elif is_core_qualification_only(item):
273	            quals.append(item)
274	        elif default_bucket == "qual":
275	            quals.append(item)
276	        else:
277	            kept_required.append(item)
278	
279	    for item in qualifications:
280	        handle_line(item, "qual")
281	    for item in required_skills:
282	        handle_line(item, "required")
283	
284	    return dedupe_similar_items(quals), dedupe_similar_items(kept_required)
285

287	def move_soft_skills_from_required(
288	    required_skills: list[str],
289	    core_competencies: list[str],
290	) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
291	    kept_required: list[str] = []
292	    kept_core = list(core_competencies)
293	    for item in required_skills:
294	        if is_soft_competency_item(item) and not is_technical_requirement(item):
295	            kept_core.append(item)
296	        else:
297	            kept_required.append(item)
298	    kept_core = dedupe_similar_items(kept_core)
299	    kept_required = remove_overlapping_items(kept_core, kept_required)
300	    return kept_required, kept_core

303	def is_solution_product_keyword(keyword: str) -> bool:
304	    lower = keyword.lower().strip()
305	    compact = lower.replace(" ", "").replace("-", "")
306	    if lower in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL:
307	        return False
308	    if lower in STACK_DOMAIN_KEYWORDS:
309	        return False
310	    if re.match(r"^dr\.[a-z]", lower) or re.match(r"^dr[a-z]", compact):
311	        return True
312	    if any(hint in compact for hint in SOLUTION_PRODUCT_HINTS):
313	        return True
314	    if re.match(r"^[a-z]+-[a-z]+$", lower) and count_tech_tokens(lower) == 0:
315	        return True
316	    if lower.startswith("cms pro") or compact == "cmspro":
317	        return True
318	    if lower in {"xframe", "ldar", "prtr", "ldar-prtr"}:
319	        return True
320	    if XFRAME_PRODUCT_PATTERN.search(lower) or compact.replace(" ", "") == "ai(xframe)":
321	        return True
322	    return False
323

325	def split_tech_and_solution_keywords(keywords: list[str]) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
326	    tech: list[str] = []
327	    solutions: list[str] = []
328	    for raw in keywords:
329	        candidate = _normalize_keyword(str(raw))
330	        if not candidate or _is_noise_keyword(candidate):
331	            continue
332	        if is_solution_product_keyword(candidate):
333	            solutions.append(candidate)
334	        else:
335	            tech.append(candidate)
336	    return dedupe_list(tech), dedupe_list(solutions)
337	
338	
339	def normalize_section_overlap(
340	    qualifications: list[str],
341	    required_skills: list[str],
342	    preferred_skills: list[str],
343	    core_competencies: list[str],
344	) -> tuple[list[str], list[str], list[str]]:
345	    kept_qual: list[str] = []
346	    kept_required = list(required_skills)
347	    kept_core = list(core_competencies)
348	
349	    for item in qualifications:
350	        if is_core_qualification_only(item):
351	            kept_qual.append(item)
352	        elif is_soft_competency_item(item) and not is_technical_requirement(item):
353	            kept_core.append(item)
354	        elif is_technical_requirement(item):
355	            kept_required.append(item)
356	        elif EXPERIENCE_ONLY_PATTERN.search(item) and count_tech_tokens(item) > 0:
357	            kept_required.append(item)
358	        else:
359	            kept_qual.append(item)
360	
361	    kept_qual = remove_overlapping_items(kept_required, kept_qual)
362	    kept_qual = dedupe_similar_items(kept_qual)
363	    kept_required = dedupe_similar_items(kept_required)
364	    kept_required = remove_overlapping_items(kept_qual, kept_required)
365	
366	    kept_core = [
367	        item for item in kept_core
368	        if not is_preferred_experience_item(item)
369	        and not any(items_similar(item, pref) for pref in preferred_skills)
370	    ]
371	    kept_core = dedupe_similar_items(kept_core)
372	    kept_core = remove_overlapping_items(preferred_skills, kept_core)
373	
374	    return kept_qual[:12], kept_required[:15], kept_core[:10]

406	def is_true_talent_value(text: str) -> bool:

415	def _token_set(text: str) -> set[str]:
416	    return set(re.findall(r"[가-힣]{2,}|[a-zA-Z]{2,}", text.lower()))
417	
418	
419	def items_similar(left: str, right: str, threshold: float = OVERLAP_THRESHOLD) -> bool:
420	    left_norm = re.sub(r"[\s·ㆍ:,.!\-/?()]+", "", left.lower())
421	    right_norm = re.sub(r"[\s·ㆍ:,.!\-/?()]+", "", right.lower())
422	    if not left_norm or not right_norm:
423	        return False
424	    if left_norm in right_norm or right_norm in left_norm:
425	        return True
426	    left_tokens = _token_set(left)
427	    right_tokens = _token_set(right)
428	    if not left_tokens or not right_tokens:
429	        return False
430	    overlap = len(left_tokens & right_tokens) / min(len(left_tokens), len(right_tokens))
431	    return overlap >= threshold
432	
433	
434	def remove_overlapping_items(reference: list[str], candidates: list[str]) -> list[str]:
435	    kept: list[str] = []
436	    for candidate in candidates:
437	        if any(items_similar(candidate, ref) for ref in reference):
438	            continue
439	        kept.append(candidate)
440	    return kept
441	
442	
443	def is_preferred_experience_variant(preferred: str, reference: str) -> bool:
444	    if not items_similar(preferred, reference):
445	        return False
446	    return "경험" in preferred or is_preferred_experience_item(preferred)
447	
448	
449	def is_distinct_preferred_item(preferred: str) -> bool:
450	    lower = preferred.lower()
451	    return any(marker in lower for marker in PREFERRED_DISTINCT_MARKERS)
452	
453	
454	def is_duty_paraphrase_preferred(preferred: str, responsibility: str) -> bool:
455	    if is_distinct_preferred_item(preferred):
456	        return False
457	    lower = preferred.lower()
458	    resp_lower = responsibility.lower()
459	    if any(marker in lower and marker in resp_lower for marker in DUTY_PARAPHRASE_MARKERS):
460	        return True
461	    if not items_similar(preferred, responsibility, threshold=0.55):
462	        return False
463	    if any(marker in lower for marker in DUTY_PARAPHRASE_MARKERS):
464	        return True
465	    stripped = re.sub(r"\s*경험\s*$", "", preferred).strip()
466	    if items_similar(stripped, responsibility, threshold=0.78):
467	        return True
468	    return "경험" in preferred and items_similar(preferred, responsibility, threshold=0.72)
469	
470	
471	def is_near_duplicate_line(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
472	    left_norm = re.sub(r"[\s·ㆍ:,.!\-/?()]+", "", left.lower())
473	    right_norm = re.sub(r"[\s·ㆍ:,.!\-/?()]+", "", right.lower())
474	    if not left_norm or not right_norm:
475	        return False
476	    return left_norm in right_norm or right_norm in left_norm
477	
478	
479	def remove_overlapping_preferred_skills(
480	    job_responsibilities: list[str],
481	    required_skills: list[str],
482	    preferred_skills: list[str],
483	) -> list[str]:
484	    kept: list[str] = []
485	    for preferred in preferred_skills:
486	        if any(is_near_duplicate_line(preferred, required) for required in required_skills):
487	            continue
488	        if any(is_duty_paraphrase_preferred(preferred, responsibility) for responsibility in job_responsibilities):
489	            continue
490	        kept.append(preferred)
491	    return dedupe_similar_items(kept)
492	
493	
494	def clean_required_skill_phrasing(required_skills: list[str]) -> list[str]:
495	    cleaned: list[str] = []
496	    for item in required_skills:
497	        normalized = re.sub(r"\s*경험\s*$", "", item.strip()).strip()
498	        cleaned.append(normalized or item)
499	    return cleaned
500	
501	
502	def dedupe_redundant_required_skills(required_skills: list[str]) -> list[str]:
503	    kept = list(required_skills)
504	    has_spring_detail = any(
505	        re.search(r"spring", item, re.IGNORECASE) and not re.fullmatch(r"spring\s*framework", item.strip(), re.IGNORECASE)
506	        for item in kept
507	    )
508	    if has_spring_detail:
509	        kept = [
510	            item for item in kept
511	            if not re.fullmatch(r"spring\s*framework", item.strip(), re.IGNORECASE)
512	        ]
513	    return dedupe_similar_items(kept)

515	
516	def is_solution_noise(keyword: str) -> bool:
517	    compact = keyword.lower().replace(" ", "").replace("-", "")
518	    return compact in SOLUTION_NOISE
519	
520	
521	def filter_solution_keywords(keywords: list[str]) -> list[str]:
522	    return dedupe_list([keyword for keyword in keywords if keyword and not is_solution_noise(keyword)])
523	
524	
525	def dedupe_tech_keywords_against_skill_bullets(
526	    tech_keywords: list[str],
527	    required_skills: list[str],
528	    preferred_skills: list[str],
529	) -> list[str]:
530	    """Remove tech_keywords that duplicate full skill bullets (tokens should stay short)."""
531	    skill_lines = required_skills + preferred_skills
532	    kept: list[str] = []
533	    for keyword in tech_keywords:
534	        token = str(keyword).strip()
535	        if len(token) <= 24:
536	            kept.append(keyword)
537	            continue
538	        if any(items_similar(token, line, threshold=0.82) for line in skill_lines):
539	            continue
540	        kept.append(keyword)
541	    return kept
542	
543	
544	def trim_description_if_bullet_dump(description: str, bullets: list[str]) -> str:
545	    if not description:
546	        return description
547	    long_bullets = [b for b in bullets if len(b) > 12]
548	    if not long_bullets:
549	        return description
550	    sentences = re.split(r"(?<=[.!?。])\s+", description.strip())
551	    echo_sentences = [
552	        s for s in sentences
553	        if any(b in s or items_similar(b, s, threshold=0.88) for b in long_bullets)
554	    ]
555	    if len(echo_sentences) >= 2:
556	        summary = [
557	            s for s in sentences
558	            if s not in echo_sentences
559	        ]
560	        if summary:
561	            return " ".join(summary[:3]).strip()
562	        return sentences[0].strip() if sentences else description
563	    return description
564	
565	
566	def _parse_section_bullets(section: str) -> list[str]:
567	    section = section.replace("\u200b", "").replace("\ufeff", "")
568	    cleaned: list[str] = []
569	    for line in section.splitlines():
570	        normalized = re.sub(r"^[\s\-\*•·]+", "", line.strip())
571	        normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", normalized)
572	        if normalized and len(normalized) > 1:
573	            cleaned.append(normalized)
574	    if cleaned:
575	        return cleaned
576	    items = re.split(r"[\n•·]+", section)
577	    return [i.strip() for i in items if i.strip() and len(i.strip()) > 1]
578	
579	
580	def recover_preferred_skills_from_source(source_text: str, preferred_skills: list[str]) -> list[str]:
581	    if preferred_skills:
582	        return preferred_skills
583	    for blob in (source_text,):
584	        match = PREFERRED_SECTION_PATTERN.search(blob or "")
585	        if not match:
586	            continue
587	        recovered: list[str] = []
588	        for line in _parse_section_bullets(match.group(1)):
589	            if len(line) >= 6:
590	                recovered.append(line)
591	        if recovered:
592	            return dedupe_list(recovered)[:15]
593	    return preferred_skills
594	
595	
596	def recover_required_skills_from_source(
597	    source_text: str,
598	    qualifications: list[str],
599	    required_skills: list[str],
600	) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
601	    if required_skills:
602	        return qualifications, required_skills
603	    match = REQUIRED_SECTION_PATTERN.search(source_text or "")
604	    if not match:
605	        return qualifications, required_skills
606	    recovered = _parse_section_bullets(match.group(1))
607	    if not recovered:
608	        return qualifications, required_skills
609	    kept_qual = [
610	        item for item in qualifications
611	        if not any(items_similar(item, req) for req in recovered)
612	    ]
613	    return dedupe_list(kept_qual), dedupe_similar_items(recovered)[:15]
614	
615	
616	def promote_requirements_from_qualifications(
617	    qualifications: list[str],
618	    required_skills: list[str],
619	) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
620	    if required_skills:
621	        return qualifications, required_skills
622	    kept_qual: list[str] = []
623	    promoted: list[str] = []
624	    for item in qualifications:
625	        if is_core_qualification_only(item) and not is_required_skill_like(item):
626	            kept_qual.append(item)
627	        elif len(item.strip()) >= 12:
628	            promoted.append(item)
629	        else:
630	            kept_qual.append(item)
631	    return dedupe_list(kept_qual), dedupe_similar_items(promoted)[:15]
632	
633	
634	def normalize_experience_qualifications(qualifications: list[str]) -> list[str]:
635	    normalized: list[str] = []
636	    for item in qualifications:
637	        match = EXPERIENCE_YEARS_EXTRACT.search(item)
638	        if match and count_tech_tokens(item) == 0:
639	            years = match.group(1)
640	            normalized.append(f"관련 분야 경력 {years}년 이상")
641	        else:
642	            normalized.append(item)
643	    return dedupe_similar_items(normalized)
644	
645	
646	def clean_job_description(description: str) -> str:
647	    cleaned = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", description.strip())
648	    if not cleaned:
649	        return cleaned
650	    cleaned = re.sub(
651	        r"^(?:SELF|PAGE|HOME|JOIN|CAREER)[!.\s·\-]*",
652	        "",
653	        cleaned,
654	        flags=re.IGNORECASE,
655	    )
656	    return cleaned.strip()
657	
658	
659	def extract_solution_keywords(source_text: str, keywords: list[str]) -> list[str]:
660	    found: list[str] = []
661	    blob = source_text or ""
662	    for match in SOLUTION_EXTRACT_PATTERN.finditer(blob):
663	        found.append(match.group(1).strip())
664	    for keyword in keywords:
665	        if is_solution_product_keyword(keyword):
666	            found.append(keyword)
667	    return filter_solution_keywords(found)
668	
669	
670	def is_valid_tech_keyword(keyword: str) -> bool:
671	    lower = keyword.lower().strip()
672	    if not lower or _is_noise_keyword(keyword):
673	        return False
674	    if lower in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL:
675	        return True
676	    if lower in STACK_DOMAIN_KEYWORDS:
677	        return True
678	    if count_tech_tokens(keyword) > 0:
679	        return True
680	    if XFRAME_PRODUCT_PATTERN.search(lower):
681	        return False
682	    if re.fullmatch(r"[A-Z0-9_]+", keyword) and lower not in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL:
683	        return False
684	    if " " in keyword and lower not in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL:
685	        return False
686	    return len(lower) >= 3 and lower.isascii()
687	
688	
689	def dedupe_similar_items(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
690	    kept: list[str] = []
691	    for item in items:
692	        if any(items_similar(item, existing) for existing in kept):
693	            continue
694	        kept.append(item)
695	    return kept
696	
697	
698	def reclassify_talent_profile(
699	    talent_profile: list[str],
700	    qualifications: list[str],
701	    required_skills: list[str],
702	    core_competencies: list[str],
703	) -> tuple[list[str], list[str], list[str], list[str]]:
704	    kept_talent: list[str] = []
705	    for item in talent_profile:
706	        if is_qualification_item(item):
707	            qualifications.append(item)
708	        elif is_required_skill_like(item):
709	            required_skills.append(item)
710	        elif is_true_talent_value(item):
711	            kept_talent.append(item)
712	        elif is_soft_competency_item(item):
713	            core_competencies.append(item)
714	        elif len(item) > 20:
715	            required_skills.append(item)
716	        else:
717	            kept_talent.append(item)
718	    return (
719	        dedupe_list(qualifications),
720	        dedupe_list(required_skills),
721	        dedupe_list(core_competencies),
722	        dedupe_list(kept_talent),
723	    )
724	
725	
726	def collapse_tech_keyword_variants(keywords: list[str]) -> list[str]:
727	    kept: list[str] = []
728	    seen: set[str] = set()
729	    for keyword in dedupe_list(keywords):
730	        lower = keyword.lower().strip()
731	        base = lower.split()[0] if lower.split() and lower.split()[0] in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL else lower
732	        if base in seen:
733	            continue
734	        seen.add(base)
735	        kept.append(base if base in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL else keyword)
736	    return kept
737	
738	
739	def is_responsibility_item(text: str) -> bool:
740	    normalized = text.strip()
741	    if not normalized:
742	        return False
743	    if normalized in {"우대사항", "필수사항", "자격요건", "담당업무", "핵심 역량"}:
744	        return False
745	    return any(marker in normalized for marker in RESPONSIBILITY_MARKERS)
746	
747	
748	def _normalize_keyword(value: str) -> str:
749	    cleaned = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", value.strip())
750	    lower = cleaned.lower()
751	    if lower in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL:
752	        return lower
753	    return cleaned
754	
755	
756	def _is_noise_keyword(word: str) -> bool:
757	    lower = word.lower().strip()
758	    if not lower or len(lower) <= 1:
759	        return True
760	    if lower in KEYWORD_NOISE:
761	        return True
762	    if lower.isalpha() and len(lower) <= 2:
763	        return True
764	    if has_ocr_garbage(word):
765	        return True
766	    return False
767	
768	
769	def clean_tech_keywords(keywords: list[str], source_text: str = "", *, limit: int = 20) -> list[str]:
770	    source_lower = source_text.lower()
771	    cleaned: list[str] = []
772	    for raw in keywords:
773	        candidate = _normalize_keyword(str(raw))
774	        if not candidate:
775	            continue
776	        lower = candidate.lower()
777	        if lower in TECH_KEYWORDS_CANONICAL:
778	            cleaned.append(lower)
779	            continue
780	        if not is_valid_tech_keyword(candidate):
781	            continue
782	        if len(candidate) >= 3 and (lower in source_lower or candidate in source_text):
783	            cleaned.append(candidate)
784	    return dedupe_list(cleaned)[:limit]
785	
786	
787	def dedupe_list(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
788	    seen: set[str] = set()
789	    result: list[str] = []
790	    for item in items:
791	        normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", str(item).strip())
792	        if not normalized:
793	            continue
794	        key = normalized.lower()
795	        if key in seen:
796	            continue
797	        seen.add(key)
798	        result.append(normalized)
799	    return result
800	
801	
802	def clean_string_list(items: Any, *, max_items: int = 15) -> list[str]:
803	    if not isinstance(items, list):
804	        return []
805	    cleaned = [re.sub(r"\s+", " ", str(item).strip()) for item in items if str(item).strip()]
806	    return dedupe_list(cleaned)[:max_items]
807	
808	
809	def postprocess_extraction(data: dict[str, Any], source_text: str = "") -> dict[str, Any]:
810	    result = dict(data)
811	
812	    qualifications = clean_string_list(result.get("qualifications"), max_items=12)
813	    required_skills = clean_string_list(result.get("required_skills"), max_items=15)
814	    preferred_skills = clean_string_list(result.get("preferred_skills"), max_items=15)
815	    job_responsibilities = clean_string_list(result.get("job_responsibilities"), max_items=15)
816	    job_responsibilities = dedupe_similar_items(job_responsibilities)
817	    core_competencies = clean_string_list(result.get("core_competencies"), max_items=10)
818	    talent_profile = clean_string_list(result.get("talent_profile"), max_items=10)
819	
820	    moved_to_qualifications: list[str] = []
821	    kept_required: list[str] = []
822	    for item in required_skills:
823	        if is_qualification_item(item):
824	            moved_to_qualifications.append(item)
825	        else:
826	            kept_required.append(item)
827	
828	    moved_from_core: list[str] = []
829	    kept_core: list[str] = []
830	    for item in core_competencies:
831	        if is_responsibility_item(item) and len(item) > 12:
832	            moved_from_core.append(item)
833	        else:
834	            kept_core.append(item)
835	
836	    if not job_responsibilities and moved_from_core:
837	        job_responsibilities = moved_from_core
838	        kept_core = [item for item in kept_core if item not in moved_from_core]
839	
840	    qualifications = dedupe_list(qualifications + moved_to_qualifications)
841	    qualifications, kept_required, kept_core, talent_profile = reclassify_talent_profile(
842	        talent_profile,
843	        qualifications,
844	        kept_required,
845	        kept_core,
846	    )
847	    qualifications, kept_required = split_experience_from_skill_lines(qualifications, kept_required)
848	    qualifications = normalize_experience_qualifications(qualifications)
849	    source_blob_early = build_source_blob(result, source_text)
850	    qualifications, kept_required = recover_required_skills_from_source(
851	        source_text or source_blob_early,
852	        qualifications,
853	        kept_required,
854	    )
855	    preferred_skills = recover_preferred_skills_from_source(
856	        source_text or source_blob_early,
857	        preferred_skills,
858	    )
859	    preferred_skills = remove_overlapping_preferred_skills(
860	        job_responsibilities,
861	        kept_required,
862	        preferred_skills,
863	    )
864	    qualifications, kept_required, kept_core = normalize_section_overlap(
865	        qualifications,
866	        kept_required,
867	        preferred_skills,
868	        kept_core,
869	    )
870	    qualifications, kept_required = promote_requirements_from_qualifications(qualifications, kept_required)
871	    kept_required, kept_core = move_soft_skills_from_required(kept_required, kept_core)
872	    kept_required = clean_required_skill_phrasing(kept_required)
873	    kept_required = dedupe_redundant_required_skills(kept_required)
874	
875	    source_blob = build_source_blob(
876	        {
877	            **result,
878	            "qualifications": qualifications,
879	            "required_skills": kept_required,
880	            "preferred_skills": preferred_skills,
881	            "job_responsibilities": job_responsibilities,
882	            "talent_profile": talent_profile,
883	            "core_competencies": kept_core,
884	        },
885	        source_text,
886	    )
887	    tech_keywords = enrich_tech_keywords(result, source_blob)
888	    raw_keywords = [str(item) for item in (result.get("tech_keywords") or []) if str(item).strip()]
889	    merged_keywords = dedupe_list(tech_keywords + raw_keywords)
890	    merged_keywords = [
891	        kw for kw in merged_keywords
892	        if not XFRAME_PRODUCT_PATTERN.search(str(kw))
893	    ]
894	    tech_keywords, solution_keywords = split_tech_and_solution_keywords(merged_keywords)
895	    solution_keywords = filter_solution_keywords(
896	        dedupe_list(solution_keywords + extract_solution_keywords(source_blob, merged_keywords)),
897	    )[:15]
898	    tech_keywords = collapse_tech_keyword_variants(
899	        [kw for kw in tech_keywords if is_valid_tech_keyword(kw)],
900	    )[:20]
901	    tech_keywords = dedupe_tech_keywords_against_skill_bullets(
902	        tech_keywords,
903	        kept_required,
904	        preferred_skills,
905	    )
906	    company_name = resolve_company_name(result, source_blob)
907	
908	    position = result.get("position")
909	    position_str = str(position).strip() if position else None
910	    if position_str and has_ocr_garbage(position_str):
911	        position_str = None
912	
913	    description = clean_job_description(str(result.get("job_description") or ""))
914	    description = trim_description_if_bullet_dump(
915	        description,
916	        job_responsibilities + kept_required + preferred_skills,
917	    )
918	    culture = result.get("org_culture")
919	    culture_str = str(culture).strip() if culture else None
920	
921	    return {
922	        **result,
923	        "company_name": company_name,
924	        "position": position_str,
925	        "title": f"{company_name} {position_str}".strip() if company_name != "Unknown" or position_str else result.get("title"),
926	        "qualifications": qualifications,
927	        "required_skills": kept_required,
928	        "preferred_skills": preferred_skills,
929	        "job_responsibilities": job_responsibilities,
930	        "tech_keywords": tech_keywords,
931	        "solution_keywords": solution_keywords,
932	        "talent_profile": talent_profile,
933	        "core_competencies": kept_core,
934	        "job_description": description[:2000] if description else None,
935	        "org_culture": culture_str,
936	        "core_values": talent_profile[:3],
937	    }
```
